note.Ketu: a chapter of endings, detachment and the quiet search for meaning
note.Venus: a long season of love, art, comfort and pleasure
note.Sun: a chapter of selfhood, authority, vitality and recognition
note.Moon: a tender chapter of emotion, home and the inner tide
note.Mars: a chapter of energy, courage, drive and conflict
note.Rahu: a restless chapter of ambition, desire and the unconventional
note.Jupiter: a fortunate chapter of wisdom, growth and faith
note.Saturn: a long chapter of discipline, labour, patience and hard-won lessons
note.Mercury: a bright chapter of intellect, learning, wit and commerce
